zh.Tremoderet, Roche, Cornwall, England: 英國英格蘭可瓦爾洛奇
zh.lifeSummary: Agnes於1196年出生在英國可瓦爾。她於大約1211年與Richard de la Roche在英國結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1283年4月20日在英國英格蘭可瓦爾洛奇享年87歲。

zh-hans.Tremoderet, Roche, Cornwall, England: 英国英格兰可瓦爾洛奇
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Agnes于1196年出生在英国可瓦爾。她于大约1211年与Richard de la Roche在英国结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1283年4月20日在英国英格兰可瓦爾洛奇享年87岁。

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: Agnes was born in 1196, in Cornwall, England. She married Richard de la Roche about 1211, in England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 20 April 1283, in Roche, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 87.

fr.lifeSummary: Agnes est née en 1196, à Cornouailles, Angleterre. Elle a épousé Richard de la Roche environ 1211, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 20 avril 1283, à Roche, Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 87 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Agnes wurde 1196 in Cornwall, England geboren. Sie hat um 1211 in England Richard de la Roche geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 20. April 1283 im Alter von 87 Jahren in Roche, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Agnes è nata il nel 1196 nel Cornwall, England. Lei sposato Richard de la Roche circa 1211, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 20 aprile 1283, nel Roche, Cornwall, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 87 anni.

ja.Bleyboll, Cornwall: イギリスイギリスコルンワル
ja.lifeSummary: Agnesは1196年にイギリスコルンワルで生まれた。約1211年にイギリスでRichard de la Rocheと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1283年4月20日にイギリスイギリスコルンワルロチェで87歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes(은)는 1196년 영국 코른월에서 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1211년 영국에서 Richard de la Roche(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1283년 4월 20일 영국 잉글랜드 코른월 록헤에서 87세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Tremoderet, Roche, Cornwall, England: Tregarrek, Kernev, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Agnes nasceu em 1196, em Cornwall, Inglaterra. Ela casou-se com Richard de la Roche aproximadamente 1211, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 20 de abril de 1283, em Roche, Cornwall, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 87 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Agnes родилась в 1196 г. в местности корнвалл, Англия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard de la Roche около 1211 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 20 апреля 1283 г. в местности рош, корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 87 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Agnes nació en 1196, en Cornwall, Inglaterra. Se casó con Richard de la Roche aproximadamente 1211, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 20 de abril de 1283, en Roche, Cornwall, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 87 años.
